column1: _____ I invite Nick to our house?
You _____ not make notes in the books.
The baby is sleeping. You _____ not shout.
You _____ not say anything if you don't want to.
I can hear you quite well. You _____ not shout.
He has left the army and doesn't _____ to wear a uniform any more.
I've bought everything, so you _____ not go shopping.
Tim gave me a letter to post. I _____ not forget to post it.
